issues.title: Advanced RAG Component Support
issues.body:
is there a plan for "Advanced RAG Component Support"?
such as "Semantic Chunking", "Reranker Model" etc..

comments.body: yes, we are looking into this. There are other issues under the RAG label that duplicate this request.

@markpollack Why was this issue closed as completed? There is no open issue regarding advanced chunking strategies like 'semantic chunking' or 'dynamic section retrieval', and up to now, neither Spring AI nor langchain4j supports them.

issues.title: OpenAi audio models are not conditional
issues.body: Inside the **OpenAiAutoConfiguration** class, the ***OpenAiAudioTranscriptionModel*** and ***OpenAiAudioSpeechModel*** beans are not conditional on properties as the other models (****OpenAiChatModel, OpenAiEmbeddingModel, OpenAiImageModel****)

comments.body:
@RikJux The `@ConditionalOnProperty` annotation has already been applied to those beans. It looks like that may have been the case when you created this issue (on the snapshot version). 

https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/main/spring-ai-spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/main/java/org/springframework/ai/autoconfigure/openai/OpenAiAutoConfiguration.java#L169

https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/main/spring-ai-spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/main/java/org/springframework/ai/autoconfigure/openai/OpenAiAutoConfiguration.java#L196

Closing the issue. Please feel free to re-open if you still see any problems. Thanks!

issues.title: Uneffective RetryTemplate usage on openai chat stream request

comments.body: This definitely needs more thought, I will remove it here (and elsewhere) until we have better strategy.  Thanks for taking the time to file an issue.
this retry strategy was already removed, will be available in M3 release.
